name: Esp32 Ble Tracker → On Ble Service Data Advertise
description: An automation to perform when a Bluetooth advertising with service data is received. See [`on_ble_service_data_advertise` Trigger](https://esphome.io/components/esp32_ble_tracker#esp32_ble_tracker-on_ble_service_data_advertise).

config_entries.label: Service UUID
config_entries.description: 16 bit, 32 bit, or 128 bit BLE Service UUID.

config_entries.label: MAC Address
config_entries.description: The MAC address to filter for this automation.
